title: Yesoa 8Pcs Mini Trash Can Toy Push Vehicles Garbage Cans Curbside Vehicle Garbage Bins for Kids Toddlers
features: QUALITY MATERIAL: Made from ABS material,which is safe and durable for kids to use,can serve kids for a long time.

MINI SIZE: the mini toy trash cans are made according to the garbage cans in daily life, there are 2 wheels at the bottom of the trash can, which can roll, and the lid of the dustbin can be opened, vivid and cute.
APPLICATION: Perfect birthday or Christmas gift for children who are obsessed with garbage trucks and cans, a great addition to kids garbage truck collections and party favors.
PACKAGE INCLUDE: 8 Pack Mini Push Vehicles Garbage Cans Toy.
description: Product description / Safety Warning No warning applicable
